examples.title: Hybrid Cloud Bursting
examples.description: Algorithm for workload redistribution during peak loads
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CloudBurst
BEGIN
  MONITOR private_cloud_load
  IF load > threshold THEN
    INITIATE public_cloud_connection
    MIGRATE non-sensitive workloads
    BALANCE traffic
  END IF
END
examples.explanation: Automates overflow handling between private and public clouds
